summary: Comprehensive testing completed for adoca.net photo gallery application. All core features working perfectly including event gallery, PicParty Live, fotoshare.co integration, and API endpoints.
passed_tests: Main route (/) loads Event Gallery with calendar - ✅
All 3 events (Paula, Fernanda, Resideo) display correctly - ✅
Fotoshare.co URLs are correct for all events - ✅
All API endpoints return correct responses - ✅
Backend API /api/events returns 3 events with correct URLs - ✅
All event buttons are clickable and functional - ✅
Calendar component loads and is interactive - ✅
External fotoshare links open in new tabs correctly - ✅
